name: Rocky Road Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl combine base ingredients: Marble cake mix and Margarine.
3. Mix at high speed until crumbly.
4. Reserve 1 1/4 cups of the crumbs; press the remaining crumbs into a greased 9x13 inch pan.
5. Put the reserved crumbs back into the bowl and add Water, Eggs, and Marble pouch.
6. Beat at high speed for 2 minutes.
7. Fold in Mini marshmallows, Chocolate chips, and Nuts.
8. Spread over the crumbs.
9. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 or until impression doesn't remain when touched.
10. Cool completely before cutting.
